name: Grandma's Current Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse currents in hot water, drain and dry on a towel.
2. Cream the butter until fluffy. Add sugar and spice; beat until well combined.
3. Beat egg yolks until thick and creamy. Gradually add to the butter mixture, blending well.
4. Add half of the flour and mix until smooth. Add the remaining flour and mix again until smooth.
5. Mix in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Pour the batter into 2 lined loaf pans (9" x 4" x 2.5"). Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 25 minutes.
7. Test for doneness by inserting a toothpick in the center.
